title: T-040 — Matrix Diff Modal (matrix_diff_modal) — cross-version compare
prompt:
# T-040 — Matrix Diff Modal

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §17.1 PLE-011
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:472-496 (`matrix_diff_modal`)
UX: design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:594-611
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement full-width Sheet/Dialog comparing two changeover_matrix_versions with color-coded diff (yellow=changed, green=added, red=removed-from-override) + delta column + [Download CSV] action.

## Implementation contract
1. New `apps/web/src/components/matrix/MatrixDiffModal.tsx` (shadcn Dialog with className max-w-7xl).
2. Server helper `apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/get-matrix-version-diff.ts` exporting getMatrixVersionDiff(versionA, versionB) → MatrixCellDiff[]; cached 5min per pair (FR-07-PLE-011-02).
3. CSV download invokes Server Action returning attachment.
4. Color tokens follow heatmap legend.

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/MatrixDiffModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/get-matrix-version-diff.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/__tests__/MatrixDiffModal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given versionA with cell {EGG→MILK: 30min} and versionB with same cell {EGG→MILK: 45min}, when getMatrixVersionDiff(A,B) runs, then result includes {type:'changed', delta:+15, color:'yellow'} for that cell
2. Given the rendered modal, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:472-496, then it has same color-coded diff table, same delta column, same [Download CSV] button, and same shadcn primitives (Dialog, Table, Button) — parity by RTL snapshot + checklist
3. Given diff cached 5min ago for same (A,B) pair, when modal re-opens, then second computation reuses cache (no DB hit, verified via spy on the helper)

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/MatrixDiffModal.test.tsx covering diff classification + parity + cache hit
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test matrix/MatrixDiffModal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not include current draft rows (only published versions)
- Do not skip cache (perf SLO needs it)
- Do not allow non-admin to download segregated cell rows (filter on download)
